## Checklist

- [ ] `swift test` passes locally
- [ ] No new warnings in the Xcode build
- [ ] If I changed `Core/`, `Services/`, or `Stores/`, I added or updated tests
- [ ] If I changed UI strings, I updated both `en` and `ar` in `Localizable.xcstrings`
- [ ] I've read `CONTRIBUTING.md` and matched the existing code style
